search_queries_used: site:uroweb.org 2026 erectile dysfunction medical sexual history physical examination laboratory testing cardiovascular psychosocial
site:dha.gov.ae erectile dysfunction endocrine guideline UAE
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic psychogenic, vasculogenic, endocrine or medication-related cause
automatic PDE5 medicine, hormone, device, procedure or referral
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Cause requires patient-specific history, examination and testing.
No medicine, dose, device, procedure or referral is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adult men with erectile-function concerns; the workflow must not be applied to other sexual-function presentations without review.
UAE_applicability: International EAU guidance transfers partially; UAE medicine, cardiovascular, endocrine, urology, fertility and referral pathways govern.
recency_verification: EAU Sexual and Reproductive Health 2026 exact sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact EAU history section supports onset, interval change, severity or impact, associated sexual symptoms, relevant negatives and patient goals without inferring erectile-dysfunction cause.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports erectile-function onset, duration, rigidity, morning erections, desire, arousal, ejaculation, orgasm, relationship, treatment and symptom-impact documentation.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact EAU examination and laboratory section supports measured vital signs, weight or BMI, focused endocrine assessment, laboratory review and previous specialist correspondence only when performed or available.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports focused genitourinary, endocrine, vascular and neurological examination, blood pressure, heart rate, BMI or waist, glucose, HbA1c, lipids, morning testosterone and selected hormone context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact cardiovascular and psychosocial section supports clinician concern, clinician-entered plan, discussed safety net, arranged follow-up and patient questions only when documented; it does not calculate cardiovascular risk or recommend treatment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented cardiovascular, mood, anxiety, life-stressor, relationship and psychosexual context without calculating risk or assigning cause.

unresolved_source_gaps: Sexual history detail, morning erections, relationship context, comorbidities, medicine, examination, BP, BMI, glucose, lipids, testosterone, cause, diagnosis and treatment remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.

legacy_item_support_mappings.direct_relationship: The exact EAU history section supports onset, interval change, severity or impact, associated sexual symptoms, relevant negatives and patient goals without inferring erectile-dysfunction cause.
